---
title: "Ensuring Equitable Intellectual Credit"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Learning Objectives

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD
